__fixture__.name: entry_sheet_start_from_template_or_prebuild
__fixture__.scenario: Paired with entry_row_start_from_template_snapshot.json. Start from a Rust + Axum baseline template. The sheet emits with open_flow_sheet_class = start_from_template_or_prebuild, sheet_surface_class = full_sheet. result_mode resolves to open_prebuild_with_setup_actions. destination_disposition = write_to_user_destination. side_effect_disclosure names dependency_install, moderate, local_with_registry, rollback_checkpoint_retained, set_up_later bypass. profile_default_disclosure names default_or_template_default with override_affordance = true. Demonstrates §5.1 start_from_template_or_prebuild, §5.2 axes (destination + side effects), §5.3 invariants 1, 3, 4.

target_type_disclosure.summary: Rust + Axum baseline template. signature_state = signed_verified.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: Snapshot does not pre-trust. Trust prompt opens after the prebuild materializes.

result_mode_disclosure.summary: Prebuild materializes with declared setup actions; minimal-open is the bypass path.

destination_disposition_disclosure.summary: Template materializes at the user's chosen destination. Pre-apply checkpoint retained.

side_effect_disclosure.summary: Cargo dependencies install on commit. set_up_later bypass available.

profile_default_disclosure.summary: Template declares a Rust + Axum profile baseline. User may override before commit.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Trust prompt opens after the prebuild materializes; the snapshot itself is signed.

fallback_disclosure.summary: set_up_later defers dependency install; open_minimal opens the prebuild without setup actions.

presentation_label: Start from template · Rust + Axum baseline
presentation_subtitle: Setup actions disclosed. Profile override available.
